entries.Summary: Listview renders DynamicLabel templates against SQL rows. Resolves tokens via LookUpEngine with named sources: submission, field, submissions, form, module, user, query. For URL attributes use |format=raw.
entries.Body: {"tokenSources":["submission","field","submissions","form","module","user","query"],"tokenFormat":"{{source:key|format=raw}}"}
entries.Title: MegaForm Listview runtime architecture

entries.Summary: Parent ? child cascade. Both Select fields nest their SQL config under field.properties: optionsSource="sql", optionsConnectionKey="DashboardDatabase", optionsSql. Child also sets properties.optionsDependsOn=["parentKey"]. :paramName placeholders bind automatically to parent values.
entries.Examples: [{"op":"add_field","type":"Select","key":"province","label":"Province","properties":{"optionsSource":"sql","optionsConnectionKey":"DashboardDatabase","optionsSql":"SELECT Id AS value, Name AS label FROM Provinces ORDER BY Name"}},{"op":"add_field","type":"Select","key":"city","label":"City","properties":{"optionsSource":"sql","optionsConnectionKey":"DashboardDatabase","optionsSql":"SELECT Id AS value, Name AS label FROM Cities WHERE ProvinceID = :provinceId ORDER BY Name","optionsDependsOn":["province"]}}]
entries.Body: {"runtime":"/DesktopModules/MegaForm/API/Field/Options?formId=N&fieldKey=KEY&__p__paramName=VAL","wrong-shape-IGNORED":"widgetProps.dataSource.query","correct-shape":"field.properties.optionsSql","steps":["Field 1 parent: {op:add_field, type:Select, key:province, properties:{optionsSource:sql, optionsConnectionKey:DashboardDatabase, optionsSql: SELECT Id AS value, Name AS label FROM Provinces}}","Field 2 child: {op:add_field, type:Select, key:city, properties:{optionsSource:sql, optionsConnectionKey:DashboardDatabase, optionsSql: SELECT Id AS value, Name AS label FROM Cities WHERE ProvinceID = :provinceId, optionsDependsOn:[province]}}"],"warnings":["optionsSql columns MUST alias to value + label","Cascade child returns [] until parent has a value — correct behavior"]}

ALWAYS â‰¥2 items.","when_to_use":{"yes":["homepage feature carousel with 3+ product cards","inline image gallery with multiple images","testimonial rotator"],"no":["âš  single header image / banner â†’ Html field with (CS-008 reject)","SQL-driven cards â†’ DynamicLabel card-grid preset","editable rows â†’ DataGrid input mode"]},"shape":{"type":"ContentSlider","key":"slider_","widgetProps":{"items":[{"imageUrl":"https://â€¦","title":"Slide 1","description":"Caption","badge":"New","meta":"$99","alt":"Slide 1"},{"imageUrl":"https://â€¦","title":"Slide 2","description":"Caption","badge":"Hot","meta":"$129","alt":"Slide 2"}],"interval":4500,"autoplay":true,"height":240,"imageFit":"cover"}},"item_keys":{"canonical":["imageUrl","title","description","badge","meta","alt"],"deprecated_aliases":{"image":"imageUrl","src":"imageUrl","name":"title","desc":"description","price":"meta","subtitle":"meta"}},"hard_rules":["CS-001","CS-002","CS-005","CS-007","CS-008"],"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"{type:\"ContentSlider\", widgetProps:{items:[{image:\"â€¦\"}]}} for a single header image","why":"CS-008 reject â€” wrong widget for this use case; also CS-007 normalize \"image\"â†’\"imageUrl\"","good":"Use Html field at insertAt:0 with ; see form_pattern-header-image"},{"bad":"items:[{image:\"â€¦\"}]","why":"CS-007 â€” canonical key is imageUrl","good":"items:[{imageUrl:\"â€¦\"}]"}],"version_history":[{"v":3,"date":"2026-05-29","changes":"Strict shape + ContentSlider-vs-Html guidance + canonical item keys"},{"v":2,"date":"2026-05-29"}]}

entries.Summary: Has TWO modes. Default: inline line-items entry (invoice-style). With useSql:true: read-only tabular display fed by masterQuery. Never both.
entries.Body: {"widgetType":"DataGrid","purpose":"Inline-editable grid for line-items entry OR read-only SQL tabular display. Choose mode by widgetProps.useSql.","when_to_use":{"yes":["line-items entry (invoice / order lines / time sheets)","tabular SQL display when DynamicLabel is too lightweight"],"no":["SQL display with <4 columns â†’ prefer DynamicLabel","user needs to PICK â†’ Select cascade"]},"modes":{"edit_in_form_storage":{"trigger":"useSql=false (default)","required":["columns:[{key,label,type,required?,decimals?,computeFormula?}]"],"optional":["minRows","maxRows","editMode","totalField","totalFormula","tableName (Phase 2 master-detail)"]},"sql_display_readonly":{"trigger":"useSql=true (delegates to MFDataGridSql)","required":["masterQuery","connectionKey"],"optional":["queryDependsOn","pageSize","columns (auto-derive when empty)","emptyMessage"]}},"hard_rules":["DG-001","DG-002","DG-003","DG-004"],"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"{type:\"DataGrid\"} with no widgetProps","why":"DG-001 reject â€” would render invoice template ITEM/QTY/PRICE/TOTAL","good":"set useSql+masterQuery (display) OR custom columns (input)"},{"bad":"useSql:true with no masterQuery","why":"DG-002 reject","good":"masterQuery is required in SQL mode"},{"bad":"Sum(qty * price)","why":"DG-005 â€” Sum needs quoted expression","good":"Sum(\"qty * price\")"}],"version_history":[{"v":3,"date":"2026-05-29","changes":"Strict schema + SQL mode shipped v20260530-11"}]}

entries.Summary: Display-only tabular widget. Master SQL + up to 3 drill-down levels + filters + pagination + CSV/PDF export. Never participates in submission.
entries.Body: {"widgetType":"DataRepeater","purpose":"SQL-driven table with XSL-style token templates. Use when rows need paging, filters, drill-down, or chart rendering.","when_to_use":{"yes":["tabular display with paging or filters","master-detail drill-down (up to 3 levels)","chart visualisation (bar/line/pie)","export rows to CSV/PDF"],"no":["no paging/drill-down â†’ DynamicLabel is lighter","user needs to PICK â†’ Select cascade","user enters rows â†’ DataGrid input mode"]},"modes":{"flat_table":{"trigger":"groupByCol empty AND chartType empty","required":["connectionKey","masterQuery"]},"grouped_accordion":{"trigger":"groupByCol set","required":["connectionKey","masterQuery","groupByCol"]},"drill_down":{"trigger":"detail{N}TriggerCol + detail{N}Query set (N=1..3)","required":["detail{N}Query must contain :parentId"]},"chart":{"trigger":"chartType in {bar,line,pie}","required":["chartLabelCol","chartValueCol"]}},"cascade_contract":{"binding":":paramName binds to field __p__paramName. Filters live under filterJson, NOT queryDependsOn.","valid_parent_types":["Select","Text","Number","Date","Radio","Checkbox","Hidden"],"invalid_parent_types":["DataRepeater (cannot self-cascade)"]},"hard_rules":["DR-001","DR-002","DR-003","DR-004"],"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"{type:\"DataRepeater\"} with no widgetProps.masterQuery","why":"DR-001 reject â€” bare emit shows forever-loading spinner","good":"always include masterQuery"},{"bad":"detail1TriggerCol:\"Round\" with detail1Query:\"SELECT ...\" (no :parentId)","why":"DR-004 reject â€” drill query needs :parentId binding","good":"detail1Query must reference :parentId"}],"version_history":[{"v":3,"date":"2026-05-29","changes":"Strict schema"}]}

{"widgetType":"DynamicLabel","purpose":"Read-only HTML rendered against SQL rows OR submission/field tokens. Display only â€” never input.","when_to_use":{"yes":["display SQL rows as cards / list / table / blog / stat / detail","render a single record selected via cascade","format submission fields into a styled layout","static HTML block with merge tokens"],"no":["user needs to PICK a value â†’ use Select instead","user needs to ENTER many rows â†’ use DataGrid (input mode)","needs paging/filter/drill-down â†’ use DataRepeater","value must be posted with the form â†’ use Hidden / Text"]},"modes":{"static_or_simple":{"trigger":"no masterQuery OR (masterQuery + resultMode='simple')","required":["widgetProps.htmlContent (real content, not placeholder)"],"valid_tokens":["{{field:KEY}}","{{submission:KEY}}","{{qs:NAME}}","{{row:Col}} (simple+SQL only)"]},"sql_multi":{"trigger":"masterQuery set AND resultMode='multi'","required":["useSql:true","dataSource:'sql'","resultMode:'multi'","connectionKey","masterQuery","wrapperTemplate (MUST contain {{rows}})","rowTemplate"],"optional":["queryDependsOn","emptyHtml","pageSize","pagerTemplate"],"valid_tokens":["{{row:Col}}","{{row:Col|format=raw}}","{{row:Col|number|date|link:detail}}","{{meta:viewName|portalId|page|pageCount|totalRows|rowsOnPage}}","{{qs:NAME}}","{{#index}}","{{#num}}","{{if:Col op value}}â€¦{{/if}}"]}},"cascade_contract":{"binding":":paramName in SQL binds to form field whose key=paramName. Widget sends __p__paramName=value.","trigger_events":["change","input (debounced 350ms)"],"valid_parent_types":["Select","Text","Number","Date","Radio","Checkbox","Hidden"],"invalid_parent_types":["DataRepeater","DataGrid","GridRepeater","DynamicLabel","Html"]},"hard_rules":["DL-001","DL-002","DL-003","DL-004","DL-005"],"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"widgetProps:{htmlContent:\"

entries.Summary: When the admin clicks "Create DB Table" in the form builder header, propose a CREATE TABLE statement matching the current form fields. The form schema is NOT written to JSON; instead AI generates DDL the admin can review and run.
entries.Body: {"trigger":"Builder header button [? Create DB Table]","aiSteps":["Read current form schema via get_form(formId)","Map each field to a SQL column using field.type ? SQL type (Text/LongText?NVARCHAR, Email?NVARCHAR(254), Phone?NVARCHAR(32), Number?DECIMAL/INT, Date/DateTime?DATETIME2, Checkbox?BIT, FileUpload?skip (server-side), Signature?NVARCHAR(MAX), Hidden?NVARCHAR(64))","Add Id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY + CreatedOn DATETIME2 DEFAULT SYSUTCDATETIME() + CreatedBy INT NULL","Use form.title slugified as table name (prefix App_ to keep out of system tables)","Emit ops: chat_message with the CREATE TABLE script + suggest_sql_run to ask admin to execute"],"notExpected":["Do NOT write CREATE TABLE into the form widgetProps JSON","Do NOT execute the DDL automatically — the admin reviews and runs it"]}
entries.Title: Wizard: Create a SQL table for this form

entries.Summary: DataGrid binds to a SQL table on DashboardDatabase. AI asks the admin to pick a table and suggests totalField + totalFormula if the table has qty/price/amount columns.
entries.Body: {"trigger":"Builder field-added, type=DataGrid, empty widgetProps","aiSteps":["Call list_sql_tables filtered by user-mentioned name (or list all)","Call get_table_columns(picked)","Use add_subform_from_table tool to configure tableName + columns","If columns include qty/price/amount, suggest totalField+totalFormula like Sum(\\\"qty*price\\\")","Confirm via chat_message"]}
entries.Title: Wizard: Just dropped a DataGrid (Subform) — what now?

entries.Summary: When the user drags a DataRepeater into the form, an empty DataRepeater is useless. AI auto-greets: "I see you added a DataRepeater. What table or query should it read?" then lists DashboardDatabase tables.
entries.Body: {"trigger":"MegaFormBuilder field-added event, type=DataRepeater, empty widgetProps","aiSteps":["Greet briefly (1 line): \"Configuring a DataRepeater — which SQL source?\"","Call list_sql_tables to get available tables","Wait for user to pick a table","Call get_table_columns(picked) to learn shape","Emit add_field op chain: set_field_property(key, widgetProps.connectionKey, DashboardDatabase) + set_field_property(key, widgetProps.masterQuery, SELECT ...) + apply_dynlabel_preset to suggest a row template","Finish with chat_message confirming what was wired"]}
entries.Title: Wizard: Just dropped a DataRepeater — what now?

entries.Summary: DynamicLabel needs htmlContent + token sources. AI asks whether the admin wants a static HTML block, a SQL-driven list (offers Layout Designer v2 templates), or a single-record detail view.
entries.Body: {"trigger":"Builder field-added, type=DynamicLabel, empty widgetProps","aiSteps":["Ask: static HTML, SQL list, or single-record detail?","If SQL: call list_sql_tables + get_table_columns","Emit apply_dynlabel_preset with the matching preset (card-grid / table-list / stat / detail / blog)","Always use |format=raw on URL attributes (src/href/background-image)","Confirm via chat_message"]}
entries.Title: Wizard: Just dropped a DynamicLabel — what now?

entries.Summary: When the Workflow canvas opens (BPMN 2.0 tab) AI assists by proposing common patterns (approval chain / sequential review / parallel-then-merge) and emitting workflow node ops.

entries.Summary: DataRepeater bound to a SQL master query with cascade parameters from earlier form fields. Uses field-LEVEL widgetProps: connectionKey, masterQuery (with :paramName placeholders), queryDependsOn=["parentField1","parentField2"]. Listview engine re-fetches when any depends-on field changes.

entries.Summary: Layout primitive. Holds 1-4 columns via columns:[{span, fields:[]}]. Span values are grid-12 units summing to 12. ONE level of nesting (no Row-in-Row).
entries.Body: {"widgetType":"Row","purpose":"Multi-column row layout. The ONLY way to put two or more fields side-by-side.","when_to_use":{"yes":["split form into 2/3/4 columns","put First name + Last name on one row","put a label-style field next to a value field"],"no":["nested rows (NOT allowed â€” canvas blocks Row drop into a column)","pageBreak / step boundary â†’ use Section instead"]},"shape":{"type":"Row","key":"row_<purpose>","label":"","columns":[{"span":6,"fields":["<full field objects nested here>"]},{"span":6,"fields":["<full field objects nested here>"]}]},"constraints":{"max_columns":4,"min_columns":1,"span_range":"1..12","spans_should_sum_to":12,"nested_rows_allowed":false},"palette_presets":[[12],[6,6],[4,4,4],[8,4],[4,8],[3,3,3,3],[3,9],[9,3]],"hard_rules":["LAYOUT-001","LAYOUT-002","LAYOUT-003"],"ai_op_constraints":{"create":"add_field type:\"Row\" with columns:[{span,fields:[â€¦]}] payload (the only way; there is no add_row op)","mutate_nested":"set_field_property CANNOT reach fields nested inside Row.columns[].fields[] (findField is top-level only). Build the whole Row in one add_field, or remove+re-add.","reorder":"reorder_fields operates on TOP-LEVEL keys only â€” Row keys move as a unit"},"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"Row inside another Row's column","why":"LAYOUT-003 reject; canvas blocks this","good":"Flatten or use Section as a heading between rows"},{"bad":"columns:[{span:5,fields:[â€¦]},{span:4,fields:[â€¦]}]","why":"LAYOUT-001 warning â€” spans sum to 9, columns will not fill the row","good":"Sum spans to 12. Use the palette presets list."}],"version_history":[{"v":1,"date":"2026-05-29","changes":"Initial strict entry"}]}

entries.Summary: Raw HTML block. THE pattern for header images / banners / hero / custom markup. NEVER hallucinate image URLs â€” use get_safe_image_url tool or set_field_image_unsplash op (IMG-001 reject otherwise).
entries.Body:
{"widgetType":"Html","purpose":"Raw HTML injection point. Default for: header image, hero banner, separator with custom styling, brand strip, divider text, embedded video, inline icons.","when_to_use":{"yes":["add a single header image / banner","add a hero section above the form","inject a custom-styled separator","insert a logo or brand strip","embed iframe / video / SVG","any one-off custom markup"],"no":["SLIDESHOW of multiple images â†’ ContentSlider (not Html)","SQL-driven HTML rendering â†’ DynamicLabel (not Html â€” Html is static)","Tokens that bind to fields â†’ DynamicLabel (Html does not parse {{field:KEY}})"]},"shape":{"type":"Html","key":"html_","label":"","htmlContent":"
...
"},"hard_rules":["HTML-001","IMG-001","IMG-002"],"image_rules":{"never_hallucinate":"NEVER write a raw image URL into htmlContent. The AI has a 100% hallucination rate on /photo- URLs.","correct_methods":["(1) Call get_safe_image_url(keywords, width?, height?, style?) â†’ returns guaranteed-working URL on picsum.photos","(2) Emit set_field_image_unsplash op with target:'htmlContent' â†’ writes the full tag for you","(3) Use an allowlisted host raw URL: picsum.photos/seed//W/H, placehold.co/WxH//?text=Label, images.unsplash.com (deep-link only â€” NOT source.unsplash.com), data: URI, relative path"],"allowed_hosts":["picsum.photos","images.unsplash.com","placehold.co","placeholder.com","via.placeholder.com","cdn.jsdelivr.net"],"forbidden_hosts":["source.unsplash.com (deprecated 2024, returns 404)"],"runtime_safety":"The renderer auto-injects onerror on every so a broken URL hides cleanly. But you should still use a working URL so the image actually appears."},"ai_op_constraints":{"create":"add_field type:Html key:... htmlContent:...","mutate":"set_field_property key:... path:htmlContent value:..."},"anti_patterns":[{"bad":"Use ContentSlider for a single static header image","why":"ContentSlider is a slideshow widget for MULTIPLE images with autoplay; for one banner Html is simpler and renders fixed","good":"add_field type:Html htmlContent:"},{"bad":"Use Html for SQL-rendered cards","why":"Html is static. Tokens like {{row:Col}} are NOT parsed by Html.","good":"Use DynamicLabel with masterQuery + rowTemplate"},{"bad":"","why":"IMG-001 reject â€” source.unsplash.com was deprecated 2024 and 404s. AI hallucinates this URL constantly.","good":" (call get_safe_image_url first to get a URL)"},{"bad":"","why":"AI hallucinates the photo-* hash; the real URL almost certainly 404s","good":"Call get_safe_image_url(keywords:\"nature\") and use the returned URL"}],"version_history":[{"v":2,"date":"2026-05-29","changes":"Added IMG-001/002 rules + image safety methods"},{"v":1,"date":"2026-05-29"}]}

entries.Summary: Paginate a long form into Next/Previous steps using Section.properties.pageBreak. Includes navigation/progress/validate-before-next mechanics + rule interactions + 4 common pitfalls.
entries.Body:
Multi-step / wizard form pattern. A long form is paginated into Next / Previous "steps" so the user fills it out in chunks. The MegaForm renderer auto-paginates whenever any `Section` field has `properties.pageBreak:true`.

KEY MECHANICS (renderer/index.ts):
- Pagination trigger: ANY Section with `properties.pageBreak:true`. No need to set `settings.multiPage:true` â€” the renderer detects pageBreak Sections automatically.
- Fallback: if `settings.multiPage:true` is set but no Section has pageBreak, the renderer auto-assigns pageBreak to all Sections after the first (so legacy forms still paginate).
- Step labels: derived from each pageBreak Section's `label` field. First step takes the form's leading Section (if any) or "Step 1".
- Navigation: built-in Next + Previous buttons. Labels come from `settings.nextButtonText` (default "Next") and `settings.previousButtonText` (default "Previous"). Submit button on the LAST step uses `settings.submitButtonText`.
- Progress bar: shown when `settings.showProgressBar:true`. Shows current step / total steps with the Section label.
- Step-level validation: clicking Next validates ONLY the visible step's fields. Hidden steps (via rules with action:hide on targetType:step) are skipped in the page flow â€” the wizard jumps to the next visible page.

CANONICAL SCHEMA (3-step contact + address + confirm wizard):
```json
{
  "version":"1.0",
  "fields":[
    { "key":"sec_profile",   "type":"Section", "label":"Your Profile",
      "properties":{ "pageBreak":true } },
    { "key":"row_name",      "type":"Row", "columns":[
      { "span":6, "fields":[{ "key":"first_name", "type":"Text", "label":"First name", "required":true }] },
      { "span":6, "fields":[{ "key":"last_name",  "type":"Text", "label":"Last name",  "required":true }] }
    ]},
    { "key":"email",         "type":"Email", "label":"Email", "required":true },

    { "key":"sec_address",   "type":"Section", "label":"Address",
      "properties":{ "pageBreak":true } },
    { "key":"country",       "type":"Select", "label":"Country", "required":true, "options":[
      {"value":"VN","label":"Vietnam"},{"value":"US","label":"United States"}
    ]},
    { "key":"city",          "type":"Text", "label":"City" },

    { "key":"sec_confirm",   "type":"Section", "label":"Review",
      "properties":{ "pageBreak":true } },
    { "key":"agree",         "type":"Checkbox", "label":"I confirm the information above is correct", "required":true }
  ],
  "settings":{
    "multiPage":true,
    "showProgressBar":true,
    "previousButtonText":"Previous",
    "nextButtonText":"Next",
    "submitButtonText":"Submit"
  }
}
```

The form above renders as 3 pages:
1. Page 1 â€” heading "Your Profile" + name row + email
2. Page 2 â€” heading "Address" + country + city
3. Page 3 â€” heading "Review" + checkbox + Submit button

NAVIGATION BEHAVIOR:
- Next button on page N: validates the visible fields ON PAGE N. If valid, advances; if any required is empty / fails validation, scrolls to first error.
- Previous button on page N: no validation, just rewinds to page N-1.
- Last page: Next button is replaced with Submit (label = `settings.submitButtonText`).
- A page can be SKIPPED with a rule: `{when: <condition>, then:[{action:"hide",targetType:"step",target:"sec_address"}]}` â€” Next button on page 1 jumps to page 3 (see form_pattern-rules-conditional-step).

INTERACTION WITH RULES:
- Rules fire on every input change EVEN on hidden steps â€” so a setValue on a step-2 field still works while user is on step 1, but the visual feedback isn't seen until they reach step 2.
- Step-level show/hide rules MUST be triggered by a field on an EARLIER step. Otherwise the rule fires too late and the user already saw the now-skipped page.

COMMON PITFALLS:
- Forgetting `properties:{pageBreak:true}` on the FIRST Section: page 1 then has no heading, and all fields before any pageBreak Section sit on the implicit step 1.
- Putting all fields BEFORE the first pageBreak Section: the wizard renders only 1 page (no other step has any fields). Always insert the Section BEFORE the fields that belong to that step.
- Confusing `Section.pageBreak` with `Section.collapsible`: collapsible is a visual UI toggle, pageBreak forces a real page split.
- Using `replace_form_schema` to "rebuild" a wizard while the user is on page 2: rerendering loses the user's page index and bounces them back to page 1. Prefer `add_field` / `set_field_property` for in-progress edits.

WHEN TO USE A WIZARD vs SINGLE PAGE:
- Use a wizard when: â‰¥10 fields total OR â‰¥3 logical sections OR mobile-first form OR fields require visual chunking to prevent abandonment.
- Stay single-page when: <8 fields OR all fields conceptually one set OR the user is power-typing and wants to tab through everything.
entries.Title: Multi-step / wizard form via Section pageBreak (canonical pattern + navigation + rules interaction)

entries.Body: DEPRECATED stub. For preserving customisations on existing premium forms, see `form_pattern-premium-shell-edits` (3 canonical recipes: change_primary_color / make_full_width / change_font) and the master prompt at `form_pattern-ai-design-master-prompt`.
entries.Title: [DEPRECATED â€” see form_pattern-premium-shell-edits + form_pattern-ai-design-master-prompt]

entries.Summary: Canonical recipes for full-width, multi-column Radio/Checkbox, and row styling.
entries.Body: {"pattern":"form-styling"}
entries.Title: Form styling â€” full-width, Radio/Checkbox columns, layout tweaks

entries.Summary: For forms where theme=custom + customHtml non-empty (Premium): edit customCss by APPENDING scoped CSS variable overrides (color/font) and scoped !important container overrides (width). Generic .mf-form rules are IGNORED because the premium CSS is scoped and more specific.
entries.Body: {"pattern":"premium-shell-edits","detection":"inspect_form_customizations returns isCustomShellMode:true (theme=custom + customHtml non-empty). It also returns cssVariables[] (the tweakable color/font tokens) and scopedRootSelector (e.g. .mfp.mfp-product-consultation) and widthRules[] (existing max-width rules to override).","golden_workflow":["1. inspect_form_customizations â†’ read cssVariables, scopedRootSelector, widthRules","2. For COLOR change: emit set_form_meta with customCssAppend overriding the matching CSS variable scoped to the root","3. For WIDTH change: emit set_form_meta with customCssAppend overriding the container max-width with the existing selector + !important","4. NEVER emit customCss replacement â€” always customCssAppend (preserves existing 5-10KB stylesheet without re-sending)","5. NEVER hand-roll .mf-form rules on a premium form â€” they are OUTRANKED by the scoped premium CSS"],"recipes":{"change_primary_color":{"goal":"Change the primary brand color throughout the premium form.","example_inspect":{"isCustomShellMode":true,"scopedRootSelector":".mfp.mfp-product-consultation","cssVariables":[{"name":"--pc-primary","value":"#0066ff"}]},"correct_op":{"op":"set_form_meta","customCssAppend":".mfp.mfp-product-consultation { --pc-primary:#10b981; --pc-primary-dark:#059669; --pc-primary-light:#d1fae5; }"},"wrong_op_explanation":"set_form_meta customCss:\".mf-form { background:#10b981 }\" â€” fights the scoped premium CSS, gets ignored."},"make_full_width":{"goal":"Make the premium form span its container instead of being centered with 720px max-width.","example_inspect":{"widthRules":[{"selector":".mfp-product-consultation .mfp-container","prop":"max-width","value":"720px"}]},"correct_op":{"op":"set_form_meta","customCssAppend":".mfp.mfp-product-consultation .mfp-container { max-width: 100% !important; width: 100% !important; padding-left: 24px; padding-right: 24px; }"},"why_important":"The existing CSS already has \".mfp-product-consultation .mfp-container{max-width:720px}\" with 0,2,0 specificity. The override needs equal-or-higher specificity OR !important; without it the existing 720px stays in effect."},"change_font":{"goal":"Swap the premium font family.","example_inspect":{"cssVariables":[{"name":"--pc-font","value":"\"Be Vietnam Pro\",system-ui,sans-serif"}]},"correct_op":{"op":"set_form_meta","customCssAppend":".mfp.mfp-product-consultation { --pc-font:\"Inter\",system-ui,sans-serif; }"}}},"hard_dont":["NEVER edit customHtml structure without explicit user approval (PRESERVE-002 + replaceCustomHtml flag)","NEVER edit customScripts (the slider JS, etc.) without explicit user approval","NEVER add new global CSS class names â€” fights theme (PRESERVE-003)","NEVER use generic .mf-form / .mf-form-wrapper selectors on a premium form â€” they are outranked by scoped CSS"],"hard_rules":["PREMIUM-001","PRESERVE-002","PRESERVE-003"]}
entries.Title: Premium custom-shell form: change color / width / font without breaking design

entries.Summary: Canonical mapping of intent â†’ field type (Email/CompositePhone/Date/Number/Textarea/Select/Radio/Checkbox/Rating/File/Signature/Url/Hidden, not always Text), Row + columns:[{span,fields[]}] grammar with 8 span presets, optionColumns:2|3|4 for Radio/Checkbox, and 5 composite patterns (contact / booking / survey / registration / order).
entries.Body: {"pattern":"layout-grammar","goal":"Teach AI the canonical mapping of intent â†’ field type and the canonical use of Row/columns + optionColumns. Stop defaulting every field to Text; stop stacking related fields vertically when a Row layout fits.","field_type_by_keyword":{"Text":["name","first name","last name","full name","title","company","position","code","reference","keyword"],"Email":["email","e-mail","email address","contact email","reply-to"],"CompositePhone":["phone","tel","telephone","mobile","contact number","phone number"],"Date":["date","date of birth","dob","from date","to date","start date","end date","appointment date","event date","due date","deadline"],"Time":["time","start time","end time","appointment time"],"Number":["amount","price","cost","budget","quantity","count","total","salary","income","age","duration","distance","weight"],"Textarea":["message","description","comments","notes","feedback","bio","about","address","details","remarks","question"],"Select":["country","city","state","province","region","category","department","industry","type of *","language","currency","timezone"],"Radio":["gender","marital status","contact method","meeting mode","virtual or in person","urgency level","satisfaction (5-level)"],"Checkbox":["interests","hobbies","products you are interested in","services you need","skills","tools you use","features wanted","preferences (multi)"],"SingleCheckbox":["agree to terms","accept privacy","subscribe newsletter","i agree","i confirm","opt-in"],"Rating":["rating","score","satisfaction (1-5 stars)","quality","recommendation score"],"File":["upload","attachment","resume","cv","document","image","photo","file"],"Signature":["signature","sign here","digital signature"],"Url":["url","website","link","homepage","linkedin","portfolio link"],"Hidden":["source","utm_campaign","utm_source","tracking id","portal id","tenant id"]},"field_type_default_warning":"If you cannot match the intent to any of the above, pick the next-narrowest type before falling back to Text. Text should be the FINAL fallback, not the default.","row_grammar":{"when_to_use_row":["2 short related fields (first_name + last_name, email + phone, city + zip)","3 related short fields (date + time + timezone, hour + minute + period)","4 small fields (4-digit OTP, monthly budget split, quarterly KPI)","1 main + 1 narrow (search box + submit button, label + value, name + badge)"],"when_NOT_to_use_row":["Long Textarea (let it take full width)","File upload widget (needs full width for drop zone)","DynamicLabel / DataRepeater / DataGrid (display widgets, full width)","Radio / Checkbox with >=3 options (they have their OWN multi-column via optionColumns)","Signature (needs full width for canvas)"],"span_presets":[{"spans":[12],"when":"single field full width â€” same as not using Row"},{"spans":[6,6],"when":"2 equal-width fields (name halves, email+phone, from+to date)"},{"spans":[4,4,4],"when":"3 equal fields (date+time+timezone, three KPIs)"},{"spans":[3,3,3,3],"when":"4 equal tiny fields (OTP digits, 4 quarters)"},{"spans":[8,4],"when":"main + sidebar (long title + small badge, search + submit)"},{"spans":[4,8],"when":"sidebar + main (label + value list)"},{"spans":[3,9],"when":"short prefix + long main (code + description)"},{"spans":[9,3],"when":"long main + short suffix (notes + status select)"}],"canonical_shape":{"type":"Row","key":"row_<purpose>","label":"","columns":[{"span":6,"fields":["{ key, type, label, required?, placeholder?, ... full field object }"]},{"span":6,"fields":["{ another full field object }"]}]},"constraints":{"max_columns_per_row":4,"spans_must_sum_to":12,"no_nested_rows":true,"cannot_set_widgetProps_on_row":"STYLE-001 reject"}},"option_columns":{"rule":"When a Radio or Checkbox has many options, the renderer can lay them in N columns via the top-level field property optionColumns:1|2|3|4.","auto_defaults":"â‰¥9 options â†’ 3 cols, â‰¥6 â†’ 2 cols, else 1. The renderer adds class .mf-option-group--cols .mf-cols-N.","when_to_set":[{"options":"1-3","recommended":"leave default (1 col)","reason":"few options, vertical reads cleanly"},{"options":"4-6","recommended":"optionColumns:2","reason":"fits 2 cols on most desktops"},{"options":"7-12","recommended":"optionColumns:2 or 3","reason":"depends on label length"},{"options":"13+","recommended":"optionColumns:3 or 4 â€” OR switch to Select dropdown","reason":"too many options for radio â€” Select is better UX"}],"canonical_op":{"op":"set_field_property","key":"<radio_or_checkbox_key>","path":"optionColumns","value":2},"wrong_methods":["Custom CSS overriding .mf-option-group â€” fragile across Plus reads like a long ladder","good":"Match field type per keyword + group short related fields in Row [6,6]"},{"bad":"Radio with 8 options stacked vertically","why":"Looks unbalanced + scrolls","good":"set_field_property path:optionColumns value:2"},{"bad":"Row.columns=[{span:6,fields:[Textarea]}, {span:6,fields:[File]}]","why":"Textarea + File both need full width","good":"Leave Textarea and File at top-level (no Row)"},{"bad":"Trying to set widgetProps.style on Row to make it 2 columns","why":"STYLE-001 â€” Row reads only columns[]","good":"columns:[{span:6,fields:[...]},{span:6,fields:[...]}]"},{"bad":"Nested Row inside Row.columns[].fields[]","why":"LAYOUT-003 â€” canvas blocks Row drop into a column","good":"Flatten into top-level Rows + Section as heading between"}],"decision_tree":["Q: What is the data the user enters?","  â†’ an email address?            type:Email","  â†’ a phone number?              type:CompositePhone","  â†’ a date / datetime?           type:Date / Time","  â†’ a number (price, qty)?       type:Number","  â†’ a long paragraph?            type:Textarea","  â†’ one choice from many?        type:Select (>=7 options) OR Radio (<=6)","  â†’ many choices?                type:Checkbox","  â†’ a single yes/no?             type:Checkbox with 1 option (e.g. agree terms)","  â†’ a 1-5 / 0-10 rating?           type:Text (last resort)","","Q: Two fields naturally side-by-side (first/last, from/to, email/phone)?","  â†’ wrap them in a Row with columns:[{span:6,fields:[A]},{span:6,fields:[B]}]","","Q: Three short fields semantically grouped (date+time+tz)?","  â†’ Row with columns:[{span:4,fields:[A]},{span:4,fields:[B]},{span:4,fields:[C]}]","","Q: Radio/Checkbox with 4+ options?","  â†’ after add_field, emit set_field_property path:\"optionColumns\" value:2 (or 3 if labels short)","","Q: Form needs a heading / step break?","  â†’ Section field with properties.pageBreak (true for multi-step) or false (just heading)"],"hard_rules":["LAYOUT-001","LAYOUT-002","LAYOUT-003","STYLE-001","STYLE-002","LAYOUT-004","LAYOUT-005","FIELDTYPE-001"]}

entries.Summary: User says "convert/biáº¿n/Ä‘á»•i this form to X". KEEP customHtml + customCss + customScripts + theme. ONLY change fields and logic. Reuse existing field KEYS when semantically possible. Patch customHtml placeholders if you rename keys.
entries.Body: {"pattern":"convert-form-purpose","goal":"Repurpose a beautifully-designed form (Scholarship â†’ Hotel Booking, Order â†’ Donation, etc) WITHOUT destroying the design work.","trigger_phrases":["convert this form to X","change this to a Y form","make this a Z form","sá»­a form nÃ y thÃ nh ...","Ä‘á»•i form nÃ y thÃ nh ...","biáº¿n form nÃ y thÃ nh ...","chuyá»ƒn form nÃ y sang ..."],"required_workflow":["1. inspect_form_customizations â€” returns customHtml/customCss/customScripts/theme presence + length + fieldKeysReferencedInCustomHtml","2. Plan the field mapping: which old keys carry the same semantic in the new purpose (first_name, last_name, email, phone usually transfer 1:1) and which need new names (gpa â†’ check_in_date, school â†’ hotel_name).","3. Emit ONE replace_form_schema with preserveCustomizations:true and the new fields[]. Do NOT include customCss/customHtml/customScripts/theme in the new settings â€” they auto-merge from the existing.","4. For each field whose key changes (e.g. gpa â†’ check_in_date), the customHtml may still reference {{field:gpa}}. Two options: (a) keep the old key but change label/type/options (least disruptive); (b) chat_message ask user to update customHtml then use replaceCustomHtml:true.","5. Update the form title via set_form_meta to match the new purpose.","6. NEVER pass customCss:\"\" customHtml:\"\" theme:\"\" â€” the dispatcher REJECTS [CONVERT-001]."],"correct_op_example":{"op":"replace_form_schema","preserveCustomizations":true,"schema":{"version":"1.0","fields":[{"key":"first_name","type":"Text","label":"First name","required":true},{"key":"last_name","type":"Text","label":"Last name","required":true},{"key":"email","type":"Email","label":"Email","required":true},{"key":"check_in_date","type":"Date","label":"Check-in date","required":true}],"settings":{}}},"wrong_op_examples":[{"bad":"set_form_meta customCss:\"\" then replace_form_schema with new fields","why":"CONVERT-001 rejects empty-string blanking of customCss; even if you bypassed it, you would have wiped the scholarship design"},{"bad":"replace_form_schema without preserveCustomizations:true","why":"PRESERVE-002 rejects; or with the new auto-merge it preserves anyway, but you should be explicit"},{"bad":"replace_form_schema with new settings:{customCss:\"\"}","why":"The new auto-merge now treats empty-string as absent and force-merges existing, but the AI is signalling intent to wipe â€” fix the intent"},{"bad":"Renaming all field keys (first_name â†’ guest_first_name) when customHtml has {{field:first_name}}","why":"Placeholders won't resolve. Either keep the key or also patch customHtml"}],"hard_rules":["CONVERT-001","PRESERVE-001","PRESERVE-002","PRESERVE-003"]}

entries.Summary: Whenever the current form has customHtml/customCss/customScripts/theme set, AI must FIRST chat_message ask the user "keep design or change?" before ANY mutating op. Dispatcher REJECTS [ASK-DESIGN] until decision recorded. Default = preserve.
entries.Body: {"pattern":"ask-before-touching-design","goal":"Never assume the user wants the design touched. Default behaviour for any customised form is preserve. AI must elicit the user intent FIRST.","trigger":"window.MegaFormBuilder.state.schema.settings has any non-empty: customHtml, customCss, customScripts (object with keys), theme, themeCssOverrides.","required_workflow":["1. Call inspect_form_customizations to read what design exists.","2. If any field is present, emit ONE chat_message asking the user e.g.: 'Form nÃ y cÃ³ thiáº¿t káº¿ tuá»³ biáº¿n (customCss N ch, customHtml M ch, theme X). Báº¡n muá»‘n (A) GIá»® NGUYÃŠN thiáº¿t káº¿ vÃ  tÃ´i chá»‰ thay Ä‘á»•i fields/logic theo yÃªu cáº§u â€” Ä‘Ã¢y lÃ  máº·c Ä‘á»‹nh vÃ  an toÃ n nháº¥t, hay (B) cho phÃ©p tÃ´i cáº­p nháº­t cáº£ thiáº¿t káº¿?'","3. STOP â€” do not emit any other op until the user replies.","4. Once user picks A or B, re-emit all the real ops with designDecision:'preserve' (option A) or designDecision:'change' (option B) on EACH op. The dispatcher remembers the choice for the rest of the session.","5. If session.designDecision is already recorded, subsequent ops in the same chat session skip the gate automatically."],"covered_intents":["xÃ³a field nÃ y, xoÃ¡ field X","thÃªm field khÃ¡c, thÃªm field Y","sá»­a label cá»§a field Z","biáº¿n form nÃ y thÃ nh ABC","lÃ m form má»›i khÃ¡c","Ä‘á»•i má»¥c Ä‘Ã­ch form","cáº­p nháº­t options","báº¥t ká»³ thay Ä‘á»•i nÃ o"],"ops_gated":["add_field","remove_field","set_field_property","set_field_sql","set_form_meta","reorder_fields","replace_form_schema","apply_dynlabel_preset","set_field_image_unsplash","add_subform_from_table","add_field_from_column"],"ops_skipped":["chat_message","save_form"],"correct_first_turn_example":[{"op":"chat_message","text":"Form nÃ y cÃ³ thiáº¿t káº¿ tuá»³ biáº¿n (customCss 9428ch, customHtml 4397ch, theme \"custom\"). Báº¡n muá»‘n (A) GIá»® NGUYÃŠN thiáº¿t káº¿ vÃ  tÃ´i chá»‰ thay Ä‘á»•i fields theo yÃªu cáº§u, hay (B) cho phÃ©p tÃ´i cáº­p nháº­t cáº£ thiáº¿t káº¿?"}],"correct_second_turn_example_preserve":[{"op":"set_field_property","key":"email","path":"label","value":"Email Address","designDecision":"preserve"},{"op":"add_field","type":"Text","key":"company","label":"Company","designDecision":"preserve"}],"correct_second_turn_example_change":[{"op":"set_form_meta","customCssAppend":".mfp { --pc-primary:#10b981; }","designDecision":"change"}],"wrong_examples":[{"bad":"Emit set_field_property immediately without ask","why":"Even renaming a label is a mutating op â€” gate fires.
